serverInfo.name: OneDrive-SkillsEditor
serverInfo.title: OneDrive Skills Editor
serverInfo.description: Create and edit Skills from your personal OneDrive /skills folder.

instructions: Author and maintain Agent Skills stored under /skills in the user's default OneDrive. Use the editor tools to create spec-compliant SKILL.md files, update manifest metadata and instructions, manage files within a skill folder, inspect validation diagnostics, and safely delete skill content.
